dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: My life... it's always been like this. A punching bag. A human ATM. A joke.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Every day, the same routine. Wake up, dread school, get beaten, go home, repeat.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: My name is Hobin Yoo. And I'm the weakest kid in school.

dialogue.speaker: Pakgo
dialogue.line: Hey, Hobin. Looking a little pale today. Did you forget your lunch money again?

dialogue.speaker: Hobin Yoo
dialogue.line: (Please, just leave me alone today...)

dialogue.speaker: Bully 1
dialogue.line: He's always forgetting something, isn't he? What a loser.

dialogue.speaker: Pakgo
dialogue.line: Relax, guys. Hobin's a good kid. He just needs a little... motivation.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: GRAB!

dialogue.speaker: Hobin Yoo
dialogue.line: Ah! Let go!

dialogue.speaker: Pakgo
dialogue.line: What's this? A half-eaten fried chicken leg? You're not going to finish this, are you?

dialogue.speaker: Hobin Yoo
dialogue.line: N-no, that's my... I was saving it...

dialogue.speaker: Pakgo
dialogue.line: Saving it? For what? To worship it? You know what? I have a better idea for it.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SMASH!

dialogue.speaker: Hobin Yoo
dialogue.line: MMPH! H-HEY!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: He shoved the greasy, half-eaten chicken leg onto my head. The bone scraped my scalp. Grease dripped into my eyes.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CHUCKLE CHUCKLE

dialogue.speaker: Pakgo
dialogue.line: Look at him! Chicken head Hobin! Hahaha!

dialogue.speaker: Bully 2
dialogue.line: Perfect! He looks like a chicken!

dialogue.speaker: Hobin Yoo
dialogue.line: (The smell... the laughter... it's burning into my brain. I want to disappear.)

dialogue.speaker: Pakgo
dialogue.line: Alright, chicken boy. Don't forget to bring us some *real* money tomorrow. Or maybe a whole bucket of chicken, just for your head.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SLAP! (on Hobin's back)

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: They walked away, their laughter echoing in the empty hallway. I stood there, frozen, the chicken leg still on my head.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: This is my life. Every single day. I'm tired of it. So tired.

dialogue.speaker: Hobin Yoo
dialogue.line: (I hate them. I hate myself more.)

dialogue.speaker: Hobin Yoo
dialogue.line: (Why can't I just fight back? Why am I so weak?)

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Later that day, scrolling through Newtube, I saw it. A random video. 'How to fight: Basic Self-Defense.'

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: It had millions of views. Comments flooded in, praising the techniques, asking for more.

dialogue.speaker: Hobin Yoo
dialogue.line: (This is stupid. I'd just get beaten worse.)

dialogue.speaker: Hobin Yoo
dialogue.line: (But... what if? What if I could learn? What if I could actually... fight?)

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The idea, ridiculous as it was, lodged itself in my mind. A desperate, foolish spark.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: I had nothing left to lose. My dignity was long gone. My money, my peace... all taken.

dialogue.speaker: Hobin Yoo
dialogue.line: (If I'm going to be humiliated, at least let it be on my own terms.)

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: I clicked on the video. My finger hovered over the 'subscribe' button. This was either the dumbest decision of my life, or the only one that mattered.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CLICK!

summary: Hobin Yoo, a perpetually bullied high school student, endures another day of humiliation at the hands of Pakgo and his gang, culminating in the infamous 'chicken head' incident. Reaching his breaking point, Hobin stumbles upon a viral 'how to fight' video on Newtube, sparking a desperate, foolish idea to change his life.
